---
title: "HYP-0022 Macro-Futures SPD-Regime Residual Dislocation"
format: gfm
---

## Result

Status: **reject** as an executable strategy in this implementation.

The run used daily roll-adjusted continuous futures for `GC`, `SI`, `HG`, `PL`,
`PA`, `CL`, `ZT`, `ZF`, `ZN`, and `ZB` from 2010-06-07 through 2024-11-29.
Rates were sign-normalized into yield/risk space for regime and residual
estimation, then converted back to futures-price exposure for PnL.

The training-selected variant was:

- Variant: `non_transition_reversion`
- Residual lookback: 252 trading days
- Entry threshold: `abs(z) >= 1.0`
- Rebalance interval: 10 trading days

Training performance was positive:

- Net return: 27.93%
- Gross/cost: 6.89x
- Daily t-stat: 1.64
- Max drawdown: -8.07%

Held-out performance failed:

- Net return: -11.45%
- Gross/cost: -4.08x
- Daily t-stat: -0.81
- Max drawdown: -20.65%

The selected variant also failed to beat its ungated control, so the preregistered
decision rule rejects the implementation.

## Diagnostics

The SPD regime layer produced usable state coverage:

- Stable regime fraction: 35.40%
- Transition regime fraction: 18.56%
- Observations: 4,483 daily bars
- Train/test observations: 3,138 / 1,345

The best held-out result in the diagnostic grid was `ungated_reversion_lb504_z2_rb5`
with 24.86% test net return and daily t-stat 1.91. That result is not acceptable
as a selected edge because the same variant had -23.22% train net return and
training t-stat -1.44.

This is the main lesson: post-2020 residual reversion exists in parts of the
grid, but the train-selected SPD-gated rule does not transport.

## Artifacts

- `results.json`
- `variant_metrics.csv`
- `regime_features.csv`
- `mst_edges.csv`
- `selected_portfolio_returns.csv`
- `selected_positions.parquet`
- `selected_zscores.parquet`
- `selected_root_gross_contributions.csv`
- `selected_monthly_test_returns.csv`
- `selected_test_equity.png`

## Next Step

Do not tune this daily residual implementation further without changing the
mechanism. The better follow-up is the 5-minute macro extension using the local
`futures_5m` and `trades/*_flow_5m` files, where `TN`, `UB`, `SR3`, and `ZQ`
are available and where regime-conditioned flow/impact states can be tested.
